mission.title: kyverno: feat(engine): support platform selection in imageRegistry context
mission.description:
## Explanation

This pull request fixes a bug where policies using the `imageRegistry` context would fail when processing container images built exclusively for non-`amd64` architectures, such as `linux/arm64`. The failure occurred because Kyverno would default to requesting the `linux/amd64` platform from the image index, causing an error if that platform was not present.

This PR resolves the issue by introducing a new feature: an optional `platform` field in the `imageRegistry` context. This addition allows policy authors to explicitly specify the target platform (e.g., "linux/arm64") for image lookups, enabling correct metadata resolution for single-architecture and multi-architecture images.

## Related issue

Closes \#13591

## Documentation (required for features)

My PR contains new or altered behavior to Kyverno.

  - [ ] I have sent the draft PR to add or update [the documentation](https://github.com/kyverno/website) and the link is:
    *(Note: A documentation PR will be cre

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: replace-image-registry-with-harbor
spec:
  rules:
    - name: redirect-docker
      match:
        any:
        - resources:
            kinds:
              - Pod
      mutate:
        foreach:
        - list: request.object.spec.containers
          context:
          - name: imageData
            imageRegistry:
              reference: "{{ element.image }}"
              # The new platform field is used here to target the ARM64 image
              platform: "linux/arm64"
          patchStrategicMerge:
            spec:
              containers:
                - name: "{{ element.name }}"
                  image: harbor.example.com/k8s/{{imageData.repository}}:{{imageData.identifier}}

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: arm
spec:
  containers:
    - image: registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-runner/gitlab-runner-helper:arm64-v18.1.0
      name: helper-arm
